title: Atomic Thesis Statement
statement: Adaptive viability is the geometry of recoverable future transformational accessibility.
expanded_statement: Adaptive viability depends on whether recoverable future transformation remains accessible under recursive constraint.

core_terms.adaptive_viability: Continued capacity for recoverable transformation under recursive constraint.
core_terms.geometry: The structure of accessibility, deformation, continuity, and constraint relations.
core_terms.recoverable: Able to preserve or restore reopenable continuity.
core_terms.future: A recursive horizon of possible transformation.
core_terms.transformational: Involving adaptive change rather than static state retention.
core_terms.accessibility: The condition of being reachable under admissible dynamics.

one_sentence_lock: Adaptive viability is the geometry of recoverable future transformational accessibility.
